---
title: "Syncthing Essentials"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Secure file synchronization across your devices in just 2 hours"
description: "Learn how to set up and use Syncthing, an open-source, secure, and decentralized file synchronization tool to keep your files in sync across all your devices."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .m { --c: #F5A623; }
        .ml-content { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; }
        .ml-content h1, .ml-content h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-content h1, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-content h2 { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
        .ml-content h3 { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
        .ml-content h1:first-child, .ml-content h2:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
        .ml-content p { color: var(--g, #86868b); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ml-content ul, .ml-content ol { color: var(--g, #86868b); line-height: 1.8; padding-left: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .ml-content li { padding: 0.2rem 0; }
        .ml-content strong { color: inherit; font-weight: 600; }
        .ml-meta { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .ml-meta-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--g, #86868b); }
        .ml-meta-item i { color: var(--c); }
        .ml-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-card { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.04); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
        .ml-card h3, .ml-card h4 { margin-top: 0; border: none; padding-bottom: 0; }
        .ml-related { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.25rem; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) { .ml-related { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        </style>
date-modified: last-modified
categories:
  - file-synchronization
  - open-source
  - security
  - productivity
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Microlearning</div>
    <h1>Syncthing Essentials</h1>
    <p>Master secure file synchronization across all your devices with this 2-hour hands-on session</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.ml-content}

# Session Overview

This 2-hour microlearning session introduces Syncthing, a free, open-source, and secure file synchronization tool. Unlike cloud-based services, Syncthing directly synchronizes files between your devices without storing them on third-party servers, giving you complete control over your data. In this session, you'll learn how to install, configure, and use Syncthing effectively to keep your files in sync across multiple devices.

## What You'll Learn

- Install and set up Syncthing on various platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android)
- Create and manage synchronization folders
- Connect multiple devices securely
- Configure synchronization options and ignore patterns
- Monitor synchronization status and resolve conflicts
- Implement best practices for secure and efficient file synchronization

# Session Curriculum

## Part 1: Introduction to Syncthing (30 minutes)

- Understanding decentralized file synchronization
- Advantages over cloud-based services (privacy, security, control)
- Syncthing architecture and how it works
- Installing Syncthing on your primary device
- Navigating the web interface

## Part 2: Basic Configuration (40 minutes)

- Creating your first sync folder
- Setting up device connections
- Understanding device IDs and authentication
- Managing folder sharing permissions
- Handling initial synchronization
- Using the Syncthing mobile app

## Part 3: Advanced Features (40 minutes)

- Optimizing synchronization settings for different use cases
- Creating ignore patterns for specific files or folders
- Managing conflicts and file versions
- Setting up relay servers for difficult network situations
- Automating Syncthing with scripts and services
- Implementing folder versioning and trash can features

## Part 4: Best Practices and Troubleshooting (10 minutes)

- Security considerations and best practices
- Performance optimization techniques
- Common synchronization issues and how to resolve them
- Monitoring and logging options
- Resources for continued learning

# Learning Outcomes

By the end of this microlearning session, you will be able to:

- Install and configure Syncthing on multiple devices
- Create and manage synchronization relationships between devices
- Implement appropriate security settings for your sync network
- Configure advanced synchronization options for different use cases
- Troubleshoot common synchronization issues
- Apply best practices for efficient and secure file synchronization

# Teaching Methods

This session combines:

- Live demonstrations
- Hands-on setup and configuration
- Real-world synchronization scenarios
- Problem-solving exercises
- Discussion of use cases and applications

# Target Audience

This microlearning session is ideal for:

- Privacy-conscious individuals
- IT professionals
- Remote workers
- Anyone who needs to sync files across multiple devices
- Those looking for alternatives to cloud storage services

# Prerequisites

- Basic computer skills
- At least two devices for synchronization (can be any combination of laptop, desktop, phone)
- Admin/installation rights on your devices
- Bring your laptop and mobile device (if available)

# Materials

All participants will receive:

- Step-by-step installation guide for all major platforms
- Configuration templates for common synchronization scenarios
- Security best practices checklist
- Troubleshooting guide
- List of useful Syncthing resources and community links

:::

```{=html}
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="ml-content">
    <div class="ml-card">
      <h3>Your Instructor</h3>
      <p><strong>CHENIST Team</strong> — Systems Administrator & Privacy Advocate</p>
      <p>Maria has been using Syncthing in professional environments for over 5 years and has helped implement secure file synchronization solutions for teams and individuals focused on privacy and data ownership.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="ml-card">
      <h3>What Participants Say</h3>
      <p><em>"I've been looking for a secure alternative to cloud services, and this session gave me everything I needed to set up Syncthing across all my devices. Great investment of 2 hours!"</em></p>
      <p><strong>— Mark T., Software Developer</strong></p>
    </div>

    <h3>Related Offerings</h3>
    <div class="ml-related">
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>Data Privacy Workshop</h4>
        <p>A comprehensive full-day workshop on personal data privacy tools and techniques for digital security.</p>
        <a href="/academy/trainings.html" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>Linux for Privacy Course</h4>
        <p>A 6-week course covering Linux-based privacy solutions for everyday computing.</p>
        <a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>Command Line Introduction</h4>
        <p>Learn the basics of command line interaction to enhance your productivity with text-based tools.</p>
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/cli-intro/" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Syncthing Essentials</h2>
    <p>Interested in this program? Get in touch to learn more.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-lk">Contact Us</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
